# RealPath Learning

> RealPath Learning generates WCAG 2.1 AA compliant, differentiated lessons for K-12 teachers in 60 seconds. ADA Title II ready. Integrates with Canvas and Schoology LMS. Built-in ELL, IEP/504, and multilingual audio support.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What RealPath Learning is and how it helps teachers differentiate instruction.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans for individual educators, school teams, and districts.
- [Help Center](/help): Guides and tutorials for using the lesson, assessment, rubric, and audio tools.
- [Sign in](/login): Existing user login.
- [Create account](/register): Sign up for a free trial.

## Optional

- [Terms of Service](/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
